query: SELECT address FROM establishments WHERE address LIKE '%Dr.%' OR address LIKE '%Alm.%' OR address LIKE '%Brig.%' OR address LIKE '%Gen.%' OR address LIKE '%Prof.%' OR address LIKE '%Eng.%' OR address LIKE '%Cel.%' OR address LIKE '%Cap.%' OR address LIKE '%Min.%' OR address LIKE '%Sen.%' OR address LIKE '%Dep.%' OR address LIKE '%Des.%' OR address LIKE '%Mal.%' OR address LIKE '%Com.%' OR address LIKE '%Cons.%' LIMIT 15;
